Key_Finding: Numbers accurate but comparison not apples-to-apples: 82% uses COT prompting while 91% does not. No statistical robustness reported. Non-mainstream venue (JRAR).
Downstream_Impact: Multi-model assignment rationale weakened; effect size may be overstated or understated depending on COT control

Claim_Summary: Logistic growth formula for agent scaling; justifies lazy loading
Key_Finding: Paper presents sigmoid collaborative scaling law (confirmed). But never mentions 'lazy loading' — that inference is entirely the citing document's. Formula describes quality saturation not architectural pattern.
Downstream_Impact: Lazy loading design decision lacks direct source support; scaling saturation finding is valid but prescriptive leap is unsupported

Paper: Tam et al. - Let Me Speak Freely
Key_Finding: Strong evidence: 27pp drop on GSM8K (GPT-3.5), mechanism identified (key ordering forces answer before reasoning). Task-dependent: classification tasks sometimes improve.

Paper: Tam et al. - Let Me Speak Freely
Claim_Summary: Paper proposes 'Think NL Write Schema' hybrid pattern (Pydantic)
Key_Finding: Paper describes NL-to-Format as one experimental condition that preserves performance. But it's not the paper's primary recommendation. Pydantic framing is citing document's addition. Looser schemas are an alternative mitigation.
Downstream_Impact: Design pattern attribution overstated; the hybrid approach works but is one of several options the paper validates

Claim_Summary: AI-assisted synthesis should disclose AI use + human-AI interaction + evaluation
Key_Finding: Paper does propose disclosure requirements matching all three pillars. But it's a foundational proposal not an adopted standard. 'speculative_adoption' tag is more accurate than 'operational_norm'.
Downstream_Impact: Normative authority of citation is overstated; recommendation is sound but framing as 'norm' premature

Claim_Summary: Experts reverse correct judgments seeing wrong AI output; 7% AB rate; justifies blind-first review
Key_Finding: 7% figure accurately reported (38/560 commission errors). But design recommendations (blind-first review label hiding disagreement logging) are citing document's inference not paper's explicit recommendations. Domain is narrow (pathology TCP estimation n=28).
Downstream_Impact: Blind-first design rationale is empirically motivated but not source-prescribed; citing document should note inferential leap
